titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Office of Community Relations, Yale University, Records
Office of Community Relations, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 09:05

did.unittitle: Office of Community Relations, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of subject files documenting the activities of the Office of Community Relations.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of the Secretary

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 4-D (YRG 4-D), Records documenting community relations of Yale University.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Office of Community Relations, Yale University, Records (RU 184). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of subject files documenting the activities of the Office of Community Relations.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of Community Relations
Yale University. Office of the Secretary

did.unittitle: Directory of Programs, Nale-New Haven Public School
Hospitality - New Haven a New Attitude
Proposal for NH city Employees to take Yale Courses
YMCA Fire plus additional YMCA Information
Democracy in NH: A History of the Board of Alderman, 1638-1988
Connections- A Community Guide to Yale
